nasb.text: They said, “We will surely give them.” So they spread out a garment, and every one of them threw an earring there from his spoil.

esv.text: And they answered, “We will willingly give them.” And they spread a cloak, and every man threw in it the earrings of his spoil.

cnv.text: 他們回答：“我們願意給你。”於是鋪開一件外衣，各人把奪得的耳環丟在上面。

ccb.text: 他们欣然同意，便铺开一件外衣，各自把抢来的金耳环都放在上面，
